features.text: Native macOS code signing for effortless installs
Shared Friends map with friend-linked popovers and last-seen cards
Versioned legal consent gates across the website, PWA, and Freed Desktop
Final Night Billboard QR poster route

fixes.text: Desktop startup no longer gets stranded on a blank window during consent bootstrap
Background scraper windows stay stable without flashing on screen
LinkedIn is now a first-class Freed Desktop source with sidebar and sync status support
Shared settings toggles and scraper window modes cleaned up cross-surface desktop controls

summary: Native macOS code signing lands alongside the new Friends map and stronger desktop startup reliability.

features.text: Adds a versioned legal consent system across the website, PWA, and Freed Desktop
Finalizes the /qr route as a no-nav poster experience with the final Night Billboard design and updated roadmap/docs markers
Friends view is now live
Adds @freed/capture-linkedin package with types (RawLiPost), DOM selectors, normalizer (RawLiPost → FeedItem), and rate-limiter (30 min base + 6 min jitter)
Move full-card like, comment, save, archive, and open actions into the author-row action cluster
Adds a UpdateDownloadProgress type to PlatformConfig and exports it from @freed/ui/context

fixes.text: Align the Facebook E2E flow with the current settings navigation before asserting connected state
Filter promoted or suggested feed pollution from X, Facebook, and Instagram
Further footer updates
Adjust footer text formatting

features.text: Adds story scraping for Instagram and Facebook as part of the existing feed scrape session, feeding Phase 8D's friend location map with story location stickers
Adds groupReleasesByDay() to the changelog server component that collapses all releases sharing the same CalVer day into a single card

fixes.text: Root cause: Scraper windows placed at (-20000, -20000) are still real macOS windows

features.text: Structured file logging via tauri-plugin-log: all Rust println!/eprintln!

fixes.text: OPML test DOMParser shim: bun test runs opml.test.ts but Bun's built-in DOMParser does not support application/xml

features.text: ToggleArchived now returns early when an item is saved -- bookmarked always wins, so the action is a no-op
Adds a sticky info toolbar to the top of the Archived view showing the current retention period (e.g
Changes the dualColumnMode preference default from false to true in the shared schema
MacOS: explains the app isn't codesigned and shows the xattr -cr /Applications/Freed.app Gatekeeper workaround

fixes.text: SectionContent was defined as a nested function component inside SettingsDialog
Changed the index signature to any (matching vite's own signature) so import.meta.env.DEV, VITE_TEST_TAURI, etc
Clean up stale build artifacts and minor text fixes
Adds a rule to AGENTS.md requiring --scope aubreyfs-projects on every vercel deploy and vercel link invocation
UpdateNotification was using glass-card whose --bg-card is rgba(255,255,255,0.03) -- basically invisible when floated over colored content
Vite WASM (Vercel build fix): Vite 7 builds web workers through a separate pipeline that does not inherit top-level plugins
Add worktree-add.sh wrapper for automatic node_modules setup
Security fix: content-fetcher.ts and save-url.ts cached raw full-page HTML instead of the Readability-extracted article body
## What

features.text: Add per-platform "Show scraper window" debug toggles to the Instagram and Facebook settings sections (under a collapsible "Advanced" section, visible when
FB/IG macOS WebViews get Safari UAs; X always gets Chrome
Subtitle: "Even death stars have an exhaust vent." Fetches GitHub Releases API with 1hr ISR so it auto-updates when new builds ship

fixes.text: Syncs package-lock.json to reflect the removal of the skills/ directory
The backfill script fetched all GitHub releases (including drafts) when building the boundary set, causing draft releases from failed builds to be used as
Fixes changelog entries silently dropping features developed during failed build attempts
Rquest (used for X API requests) links BoringSSL statically as its TLS implementation
UA selection for Facebook happens in fb-auth.ts at connect time (showFbLogin calls selectPlatformUA)
The anti-detection hardening PR (#119) stripped packages/capture-x/package.json down to just a typecheck script (no build) since the package now only exports
Hide scraper window after FB scrape, stop stealing focus on IG scrape

features.text: Adds a live FPS monitor (rAF-based) visible in the debug panel's new Performance tab, with sparkline, p95 frame time, dropped frame count, and long-task
Connection indicator dots in the sidebar are now small, subtle purple dots (6px, bg-[#8b5cf6]/50) instead of large green ones, and sit just right of the label
Outbox pattern for platform write-back: User intent (like, mark-read) is recorded in Automerge immediately on any device

fixes.text: Restore tracing dependency versions and tighten release script
Two TypeScript compile errors blocking the v26.3.802 release build on all four platforms
Caused all social settings tests to see the connected state instead of the disconnected state they assert on
Remove accidentally committed node_modules symlinks and tsbuildinfo
Update Sidebar and XSourceIndicator components for improved UI and functionality

features.text: Adds full Instagram feed capture using the same WebView-based architecture as the existing Facebook integration
Add freed-ship-build command
Scroll to top on source change: FeedList now resets scroll position when activeFilter changes, so switching sources in the sidebar always starts at the top
Replaces the single-item ReaderThumbnail left panel with a full virtualized feed list of square compact cards that mirror the main feed
X scraper fix: Updated stale GraphQL query IDs, corrected timeline response parsing to handle the data wrapper, added proper user-agent header
Replaces the manual cookie-pasting flow (DevTools > Application > Cookies) with a native WebView login window at x.com

Add freed-build-feature command documentation
Adds a two-column reader layout: clicking a card in dual-column mode shows a compact thumbnail on the left (author, title, preview, hero image) and the full
Injects window.__TAURI_INTERNALS__ via page.addInitScript() before page load, so the full React app boots in plain Chromium without a running Tauri binary

fixes.text: Prefixes the unused state parameter with _ in recordSuccess() in packages/capture-instagram/src/rate-limit.ts
} }) broke
TimelineResponse had a redundant data wrapper that conflicted with XApiResponse<T> which already provides the data envelope

Double-cast window through unknown to satisfy strict TS in mock files

performance.text: Bootstrap desktop E2E Playwright test suite (Chromium, no native Tauri binary required) with comprehensive performance benchmarks across cold load, scroll,

features.text: Replaces the silent "All caught up" failure with a per-stage diagnostic panel in Settings > Sources > X that shows bytes received, instructions found, tweets
Adds X settings page to the PWA under Settings > Sources > X, showing synced post count + last sync time when X content is present, and a download CTA when
X connection/disconnect/sync is now a dedicated page under Settings > Sources > X, alongside Feeds and Saved Content
All 5 GraphQL query IDs were stale - updated to current values from [TwitterInternalAPIDocument](https://github.com/fa0311/TwitterInternalAPIDocument)
Search bar now fills the full header center region (no max-w cap) with reduced contrast: transparent background, subtle white/6 border, soft focus ring
Adds a Mark read on scroll toggle to the reader settings section (default: on)
Replaces the narrow SettingsPanel bottom sheet with a full two-column SettingsDialog
+ New dropdown: Replaced the \+ Add Feed\ button in the top bar with a \+ New\ dropdown containing \RSS Feed\ (existing \AddFeedDialog\) and \Saved Content\
Adds a persistent search bar to the header that queries every FeedItem field (body text, link headlines, author name/handle, feed title, preserved article text
Expands Phase 8 from a single geo-map stub into a full Friend CRM with four sub-phases: identity layer, force-directed social graph, friend detail panel with
Fix broken Archived view: showArchived was renamed to archivedOnly with correct filter semantics
Rewrote manifesto with four named sections (Problem, Pact, Solution, Believe), shorter sentences, empowering "Freed on your side" framing, and updated Go

fixes.text: Update Header component layout and spacing
X 422 GRAPHQL_VALIDATION_FAILED: The HomeLatestTimeline endpoint expects GET with variables/features as URL query params, not POST with a JSON body
Feed cards were left-aligned on wide viewports because mx-auto has no effect on absolutely-positioned elements with left: 0 pinned
Packages/desktop/src-tauri/.cargo/config.toml had target-dir = "/Users/aubreyfalconer/.cargo/freed-target"
Six pre-existing TypeScript errors were blocking the Release Desktop App workflow on all platforms
FollowingEntry.content in types.ts was missing value?: string and cursorType?: "Top" | "Bottom"
AddRssFeed, updateRssFeed, and updateFeedItem in schema.ts now call stripUndefined before writing to the Automerge proxy
Sidebar section header buttons (SOURCES, LIBRARY, FEEDS) were rendering at 32px while source/feed items were 34px
Automerge's CRDT proxy throws on any undefined assignment since it's not a valid JSON value -- this was the root cause of the crash seen during bulk import
Header: search hidden on mobile, right padding reduced to pr-1 to visually balance the logo margin, sync button outline removed
Verified via browser automation: gap-2 (8px) left only ~3px of visual clearance between the FREED logo and the search input border
Removes asymmetric legacy offsets (-ml-2, ml-1 md:ml-0, px-3 on search wrapper) so every gap in the toolbar row comes from a single source: the container's
CSS @import order bug — both pwa/src/index.css and desktop/src/index.css placed @import "../../ui/src/index.css" after the @tailwind directives
Replaced the activeSection === "updates" auto-check trigger with a dedicated IntersectionObserver on the "Check for updates" button container
Enhance Ulysses Mode and Manifesto content for clarity and impact
Creates packages/ui/src/index.css as the single source of truth for all design-system global classes
Init flash (both platforms): isLoading now starts as true in both stores
Window.__TAURI__.core.invoke is not typed with generics in the Tauri v2 type declarations, causing TS2558: Expected 0 type arguments, but got 1 and five
Capture-save/package.json: Switched exports from gitignored dist/.js files to src/.ts source directly
| File | Change | |------|--------| | \src/lib/pwa-updater.ts\ | Added \startPeriodicUpdateCheck()\ -- fires \checkForPwaUpdate()\ every hour | |

Update lockfile after installing plugin-fs and plugin-store
Catch up all worktree branches to main
Tighten intro post, manifesto, and CONTRIBUTING copy
On mobile (< 768px), html/body now allow document-level scrolling instead of being overflow: hidden. Desktop behavior unchanged
Adds an isActive helper that matches both exact paths and sub-routes (e.g. /updates stays active on /updates/introducing-freed)
Added \target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"\ to Star the repo, Try the PWA, and Contribute links in the introducing-freed post
Rewrote manifesto for punch and empowerment: tighter prose, "we" framing throughout, sections consolidated to single paragraphs, removed self-referential

performance.text: Every third-party article URL CORS-blocks in the browser, so the spinner never stopped
Removes the full-screen black spinner on startup. The app shell and skeleton feed cards appear immediately on first paint

features.text: All icons use currentColor so they inherit the parent text color automatically
Bulk Unsubscribe (Feeds > Manage tab): "Remove all N feeds…" button with a confirmation dialog

Improved UX flow and visual polish in the SyncConnectDialog component in the PWA
Adds a /privacy route to the marketing website with a full privacy policy page

fixes.text: PWA updates were silently broken: skipWaiting: true in the Workbox config caused new service workers to skip the waiting phase entirely, so onNeedRefresh
The existing network-based heal in refreshAllFeeds continues to run and upgrades hostname titles to real XML <title> values
The Tauri OAuth callback server now races both IPv4 and IPv6 loopback listeners so macOS browsers that resolve \localhost\ → \::1\ still complete the flow
Root cause: PWA's SyncConnectDialog had bespoke inline cloud provider buttons labelled "Connect Dropbox" / "Connect Google Drive"

Data-tauri-drag-region must be present on every element Tauri should treat as a drag target — CSS attribute inheritance does not apply to HTML attributes
